# SmartRecruit

> AI-powered enterprise recruitment portal connecting candidates, recruiters, and companies with intelligent resume-to-job matching.

SmartRecruit streamlines the hiring pipeline for global enterprises. Candidates create profiles and apply to roles; recruiters post jobs and shortlist with AI match scores; admins manage users, companies, and reporting across the platform.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, featured jobs, how SmartRecruit works.
- [Browse Jobs](/jobs): Search and filter open roles across companies.
- [Companies](/companies): Enterprise employers hiring on SmartRecruit.
- [About](/about): How SmartRecruit reinvents enterprise hiring with AI.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the SmartRecruit team.
